title: Blockception
description: An unofficial Textures made of blocks remake updated to newer versions with mod support.
body:
# Blockception

An unofficial remake of the [Textures made of blocks](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/textures-made-of-blocks/) texturepack, updated to newer versions and with mod support.

## Mod support
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty) (Curseforge)
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)
- [No Tree Punching](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-tree-punching)
- [Alex's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-mobs) (Curseforge)
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
- [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) (Curseforge)

## Notes
- The screenshots use the [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels) shaderpack.
